headline: Delta Air Lines announces a significant C-suite reorganization, including the retirement of its Chief of Operations and the internal appointments of a new President, COO, and CFO.
investor_impact: This broad C-suite reshuffle introduces some near-term transition risk, though the reliance on tenured internal executives provides strategic continuity. Investors will focus on how the new CFO, Erik Snell, manages capital allocation and whether the new COO, Daniel Janki, can maintain Delta's operational reliability premium.
key_figures: John E. Laughter (retiring EVP - Chief of Operations effective April 30, 2026)
Peter W. Carter (appointed President effective April 1, 2026)
Daniel C. Janki (appointed EVP - Chief Operating Officer effective April 1, 2026)
Erik S. Snell (appointed EVP - Chief Financial Officer effective April 1, 2026)
